row5_attn_internal_Tensile: NOT MEASURABLE: the Tensile route covers FFN gateup/down + q/o PROJECTIONS only; there is no extracted Tensile kernel for the attention COMPUTE (Q@K/P@V). 'all roles' == R4 (FFN+qo). Documented, not inferred.
key_finding: Tensile prefill is CLOCK-STABLE (~2640 tok/s both DPM states); tinygrad WMMA-concrete is CLOCK-VOLATILE across sessions (1449-2675). Tensile = 1.76-1.83x over concrete-KV REPRODUCED -> the old 1.76x is REAL; the prior 0.997x sessions had WMMA anomalously at ~2675 (high-clock outlier).
